sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check blue rectangle position after DOWN
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue rect: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Let me also check all positions to understand the layout better
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check timer
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nTimer: {ascii_lines[0][:64]}")
timer_len = sum(1 for c in ascii_lines[0] if c == 'N')
print(f"Timer length: {timer_len}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
